title: EdgeSpec
description: A directed edge connecting two nodes in the workflow graph. Edges define control flow; optional condition expressions enable branching logic.

id.description: Unique edge identifier within the graph. Must be non-empty and unique among all edges in the same GraphSpec.

source.description: Source node id. Must reference a valid NodeSpec.id within the same graph.

target.description: Target node id. Must reference a valid NodeSpec.id within the same graph, or the special end sentinel 'END'.

condition.description: Optional condition expression for conditional edges. Evaluated at runtime to determine if this edge is traversed. Supports simple expressions like 'state.status == "success"' or JMESPath-like paths. Null means the edge is always traversed (unconditional).
